data.title: Three Wallets Snag ‘Base is for everyone’ Tokens Before Official Announcement, Profiting $666K
data.description:
• Three wallets snapped up Base is for everyone token before its official announcement on X, pocketing hefty profits.
  • Base’s creator Jesse greenlighted the token.

data.title: Bitcoin Rally Short-Circuited as Fed Chair Powell Raises Stagflation Fear
data.description:
• Fed Chair Jerome Powell raised stark concerns over the effects of President Trump's tariffs policy.
  • Bitcoin and stocks both tumbled on Powell warning.

data.title: Neutrl Raises $5M to Tokenize a Popular Hedge Fund Altcoin Trade
data.description:
• Neutrl has raised $5 million to launch bring hedge fund-style crypto yield strategies to a broader range of investors through a single token.
  • Inspired by Ethena's success, NUSD is a synthetic dollar token built on OTC altcoin arbitrage and delta-neutral hedging.
  • Backed by STIX, Accomplice and crypto veterans, Neutrl targets a $10 billion market of locked token deals as DeFi yields remain low.

data.title: Bitcoin Miners With HPC Exposure Underperformed in First Two Weeks of April: JPMorgan
data.description:
• Pure play miners outperformed those with HPC exposure in the first two weeks of April, the report noted.
  • The network hashrate rose, while the bitcoin price fell, which pressured mining economics, the bank said.
  • JPMorgan noted that only MARA Holdings and CleanSpark outperformed bitcoin over the first two weeks of the month.

data.title: Bitcoin's True Capitulation Zone is $65K, Says Well-Followed Analyst
data.description:
• Long-term holders could face unrealized losses if bitcoin drops to the $65K "true market mean," said analyst James Check.
  • A $1 trillion market cap for bitcoin — a price of about $50,000 — should be a strong area of suuport.

data.title: Coinbase Revenue, Trading Outlook Hit by Tariff Tensions: Oppenheimer
data.description:
• Oppenheimer lowered Coinbase’s 2025 trading volume estimate to $1.3 trillion from $1.6 trillion.
  • Analysts cite recession concerns linked to President Trump’s fluctuating tariff policies as a key driver of reduced retail trading.
  • Coinbase’s market share has grown to 69% of U.S. spot crypto trading, but macroeconomic uncertainty clouds future growth.

data.title: Mantra Plans 'Comprehensive Burn Program' of OM Following 90% Crash
data.description:
• Real-world asset project Mantra plans to create a comprehensive burn program for its OM token, CEO John Mullin has said.
  • Mullin was responding to a post which said he was planning to burn his team's tokens to win back the trust of the community after OM abruptly lost over 0% of its value.
  • Mullin blamed the drop on exchanges closing OM positions, but not everybody was buying this explanation.

data.title: Resolv Labs Raises $10M as Crypto Investor Appetite for Yield-Bearing Stablecoins Soars
data.description:
• Resolv Labs raised $10 million in a seed round to scale its yield-generating stablecoin protocol Resolv. The fundraising was led by Cyber.Fund and Maven11, with Coinbase Ventures, Susquehanna, Arrington Capital, Animoca Ventures also participating.
  • The protocol offers crypto-native, delta-neutral yield strategy to USR stablecoin holders, inspired by structured finance products.
  • The fundraising underscores the rapidly rising investor interest in stablecoin protocols that generate yield to token holders.

data.title: Trump-Family Backed World Liberty Gets $25M Investment From DWF Labs
data.description:
• DWF Labs opened NYC office to deepen U.S. institutional and regulatory relationships
  • The market maker invested $25 million in WLFI tokens from the Trump family-backed DeFi protocol World Liberty Financial.
  • The firm will provide liquidity for USD1, the protocol’s stablecoin.

data.title: Bitcoin at Risk of Dropping to $75K if BTC's $83K Support Breaks, Chart Analysis Show
data.description:
• Bitcoin's recovery rally has stalled, with the $86,000 mark acting as a resistance zone.
  • Key momentum indicators suggest a potential bearish shift, as the 50- and 100-hour SMAs are poised for a bearish crossover.
  • A move below $83,000 could trigger a sell-off, while a close above $86,000 is needed to continue the recovery rally.
